segments.highlighted_phrase: What a resounding chase from RCB that is!
segments.text: Chinnaswamy Stadium on Saturday. What a resounding chase from RCB that is! Brilliant knocks from Devdutt Padikkal, Rajat Patidar, and of course, Virat Kohli as RCB stormed its chase of 202 with 26 balls to spare.
